import pandas as pd

product_data = locals()['var_function-call-15722419884660320062']
df = pd.DataFrame(product_data)

# Filter for products that seem like AI processing units based on keywords
# Making keywords case-insensitive and flexible
filtered_products = df[
    df['Name'].str.contains(r'AI.*(Process|Unit|Chip)|(Process|Unit|Chip).*AI', case=False, na=False) |
    df['Description'].str.contains(r'AI.*(Process|Unit|Chip)|(Process|Unit|Chip).*AI', case=False, na=False)
]

# Prioritize products that explicitly mention "AI" and "processing unit" or similar terms
# Looking for more specific matches first
specific_matches = filtered_products[
    (filtered_products['Name'].str.contains(r'AI', case=False, na=False) & 
     (filtered_products['Name'].str.contains(r'process', case=False, na=False) | filtered_products['Name'].str.contains(r'unit', case=False, na=False) | filtered_products['Name'].str.contains(r'chip', case=False, na=False))) |
    (filtered_products['Description'].str.contains(r'AI', case=False, na=False) & 
     (filtered_products['Description'].str.contains(r'process', case=False, na=False) | filtered_products['Description'].str.contains(r'unit', case=False, na=False) | filtered_products['Description'].str.contains(r'chip', case=False, na=False)))
]

# If no specific matches, fall back to broader matches
if not specific_matches.empty:
    ai_product_id = specific_matches.iloc[0]['Id']
elif not filtered_products.empty:
    ai_product_id = filtered_products.iloc[0]['Id']
else:
    ai_product_id = None


print("__RESULT__:")
print(ai_product_id)

]

# Get the IDs of these filtered products
filtered_product_ids = final_ai_processing_units['Id'].tolist()

import pandas as pd
import json

# Product data from previous call

# Define keywords for 'AI' and 'processing unit'
ai_keywords = ['AI', 'Artificial Intelligence']
unit_keywords = ['unit', 'processor', 'chip', 'circuit', 'tech', 'innovator', 'module', 'computing']

# Filter for products that contain 'AI' in their name or description (case-insensitive)
ai_relevant_products = df_products[
    df_products['Name'].str.contains('|'.join(ai_keywords), case=False, na=False) |
    df_products['Description'].str.contains('|'.join(ai_keywords), case=False, na=False)
]

# Further filter these AI-relevant products for 'processing unit' related keywords
# Ensure at least one AI keyword AND one unit keyword are present
final_ai_processing_units = ai_relevant_products[
    (ai_relevant_products['Name'].str.contains('|'.join(unit_keywords), case=False, na=False)) |
    (ai_relevant_products['Description'].str.contains('|'.join(unit_keywords), case=False, na=False))
]

# Get the IDs of these filtered products
filtered_product_ids = final_ai_processing_units['Id'].tolist()

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(filtered_product_ids))
